'''Dyans ke Vasan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Adumari]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]]. ke Vasan and his flight challenged [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] pilot [[Wes Janson/Legends|Wes Janson]] to a duel upon [[Red Flight]]'s—a group composed of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] veterans—diplomatic visit to the planet. ke Vasan and his entire flight was shot down by Red Flight after a brief duel.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'' {{1st}}
